title: Hosting Images For A Workform On A Monday Board
excerpt: So I am aware that we have the capacity to utilize html to put photos into our work forms, which is great when using URLs to pull those images. I was planning on putting all of the images I want to use in my workform ont…

posts.author: ConSexton05 (Connor Sexton)
posts.cookedHtml: So I am aware that we have the capacity to utilize html to put photos into our work forms, which is great when using URLs to pull those images. I was planning on putting all of the images I want to use in my workform onto another Monday board to host them, but I run into the issues of not being able to access a static url for the images. I understand that they change in order to protect the images, but i was wondering if there was some way to avoid this for the form to be able to function long term.

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Connor! Currently, we don’t have an option to generate a URL for an uploaded file on a board that can be embedded into a WorkForm. As of now, these images would need to be hosted in another environment.

That said, our product team is eager for this kind of feedback to include in their discussions for future improvement. This feedback can be submitted directly to a dedicated section of our community page. Learn more here
